name: pte
description: A lightweight PTE Academic practice app for speaking, writing, reading, and listening, now with backend-managed AI scoring and audio transcription for speaking tasks.

scripts.build: rm -rf www && mkdir -p www && cp -r index.html app.js styles.css env.js 404.html js public data logo_transparent_final.png logo.jpg www/ 2>/dev/null; true
scripts.sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.open:ios: npm run sync && npx cap open ios
